title: Adam Rose PB&J Bites Instagram Ad / If You Mash Strawberries
about: The Adam Rose PB&J Bites Instagram Ad or Adam Rose Soy Face, also known as the "If You Mash Strawberries" Ad refers to a reaction image derived from a viral shortform video by Adam Rose, which was promoted as an advertisement by Instagram, in which he reacts to someone making "PB&J bites" and then makes them himself. The video was posted online in January 2025. Later that year, screenshots of the video that highlight Rose's soyjak-like face circulated online, with many of the posts expressing annoyance over the ad. Images of Rose making the face continued to spread in early 2026, going viral on X / Twitter that February.
origin:
On January 29th, 2025, content creator Adam Rose posted a video made in partnership with Instagram to his Instagram [1] account where he reacts to a chef making "PB&J bites," then makes and taste tests his own version of the recipe. The video gained over 418,000 likes in a year.

The post, which was advertised on Instagram, started spreading on social media later that year in posts where users expressed how annoying they found it.

One of the earliest examples is a post made on June 12th, 2025, by Redditor SquishySqueaky00 to the /r/doodoofard [2] subreddit titled, "it's not that interesting buddy," garnering over 1,700 upvotes in eight months.

The next day, Redditor justfkinkillme7 posted a comment under the thread [3] that turns Rose's face in the video into a Soyjak, garnering over 600 upvotes in the same span of time.
